scripts.build-common: cd packages/common && npm run build-publish && cd ../..
scripts.common-publish-force: cd packages/common && npm run publish-force && cd ../..
scripts.build-common-update-dependency: npm run build-common && npm run update-common-icrc && npm run update-common-hpl
scripts.build-lib-dependency: npm run build-common && npm run build-common-update-dependency
scripts.build-icrc: cd packages/icrc && npm run build-publish && cd ../..
scripts.icrc-publish-force: cd packages/icrc && npm run publish-force && cd ../..
scripts.build-hpl: cd packages/hpl && npm run build-publish && cd ../..
scripts.hpl-publish-force: cd packages/hpl && npm run publish-force && cd ../..
scripts.update-console: cd examples/console.app && npm run update-middleware && cd ../..
scripts.build-all: clear && npm run build-common && npm run build-common-update-dependency && npm run build-icrc && npm run build-hpl && npm run update-console
scripts.build-all-force: clear && npm run common-publish-force && npm run build-common-update-dependency && npm run icrc-publish-force && npm run hpl-publish-force && npm run update-console
